title: EAQ Kids Easel,Height Adjustable Wooden Art Easel,Whiteboard Chalkboard with Paper Roll Holder, Chalk Board for Kids,Best Birthday Gift for Kids (Wood)
features: 【3-in-1 children's drawing board】 1. Green board; 2. White magnetic board/drawing board; 3. Available scroll paper. The shelf below is used to store and preserve chalk, blackboard erasers, magnetic stickers, etc. Please note: marker pens are not included.

【Educational toys for children aged 3-12】 The size of the easel kids is 96.5-132cm. This wooden kids easel will accompany your children to grow up and bring them great fun. The kids' easels are very suitable for learning and creativity at home. Not suitable for children under 3 years old. Use under adult supervision.
【Rich accessories】Each childrens easel set includes 52 colorful magnetic letters, numbers and symbols, 4 painting cups, 6 magnets,1 box of chalk（ Anti-Dust White Chalks）,1 ruler, 1 eraser.

【High-quality wood】Made of non-toxic, environmentally friendly, high-quality pine wood to maintain the highest health and safety standards. The solid structure of this art easel makes it very safe for toddlers. Should be assembled by an adult.

【Tips】Please keep in mind that the blackboard is for chalk only. The whiteboard can only be written with a whiteboard pen. Do not draw on the whiteboard with a marker or a watercolor pen, otherwise it cannot be erased. Please peel off the protective film before use.
description: Product Description T ips: 1. It is recommended for children over 36 months to use it under the guidance of adults. 2. Only assembled by adults. 3. Before use, please tear off the protective film on the board. 4. Please note: Whiteboard markers are not included, and a box of dust-free chalk is given as a gift. Detalis Packing size: 29*23*4inch Weight: 11.92pounds Material: Pine Is there roll paper: No The best gift for children Why choose EAQ kids easel? 3 in 1 Drawing board The multifunctional design meets the different needs of children. The 3in1 wooden drawing board for children can meet the age group of 3-12 years old. The storage box can hold painting supplies. More tidy and convenient. Adjustable height Don't worry about the height of the drawing board as the child grows up. In order to be able to use it for a long time, the height can be adjusted from 96.5-132cm. Package Contents: 1 x green chalk board and white magnetic board 1 x measuring rule 1 x chalk box 1 x chalk set 1 x letter magnet sticker 1 x eraser 4 x paint container 1 x Animal Magnetic Sticker 1 x manual Start playing with your friends Let the children draw the beautiful sky and birds together and spend the happiest day
